## What changed

Describe the behavior and files changed.

## Why

Link the issue or Mission Control task and explain the user or operator impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Relevant manual workflow or UI verification completed
- [ ] Complete diff reviewed for secrets, runtime state, generated files, and unrelated changes

## Safety and operations

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private data, or unnecessary PII were added
- [ ] Persistence, migration, permissions, and recovery implications are documented when relevant
- [ ] GitHub App or worker permission changes use least privilege
- [ ] QA, protected-branch, release, and production boundaries remain intact
- [ ] Rollback or failure-mode notes are included for cross-cutting changes

## Known limitations

List remaining gaps or write `None`.
